_note: FROZEN mythograph for the Tabard terminal — borges.generate(71), "The Fixed Hour", told by Luna. Re-derive: node from borges/js/{prng,tellers,lexicon,generate}.js → BORGES.generate(71). The Seven post mythographs to the Tabard intranet before the telling (chapter1_bible.md); this is one such post. hoop/test/v094.selftest.mjs pins the resonance (Luna/Recognition/Branding/M341) against the live engine so drift is caught.
title: The Fixed Hour
kicker: Told by Luna ☽ · Navigator & keeper of the dream-logs

actant.subject: Väinämöinen
actant.value: the limit itself: desired against, never reached
actant.receiver: Väinämöinen, and the dark farms of the North

acts.label: The setting and the first wrong
The proof, the truth, the wedding

moves.name: Initial situation
moves.gloss: The family and the hero are introduced.

moves.name: Interdiction
moves.gloss: A prohibition is laid on the hero.

moves.name: The donor's test
moves.gloss: The hero is tested by a donor.

moves.name: Hero's reaction
moves.gloss: The hero responds to the donor.

moves.name: Struggle
moves.gloss: Hero and villain join in direct combat.

list.name: The doom foretold at the cradle
list.gloss: A prophecy fixes the hero's fate to a set time or a set agent.

list.name: The formulistic three
list.gloss: Three days, three tasks, three blows: the tale counts in threes.

list.name: Fate's thumb on the scale
list.gloss: Chance leans the hero's way so plainly the hall remarks it.

list.name: Transformation as the price of the tabu
list.gloss: The forbidden thing, once done, is paid for not in death but in a changed shape.

list.name: Fairies carry mortals off
list.gloss: The Otherworld reaches across a threshold-hour and takes a person away.

list.name: The clever one outwits the strong
list.gloss: Wit beats force; the small or weak undoes the great.

cast.name: Väinämöinen
cast.epithet: born on the knee of the air

themes.label: the supplication
themes.note: The suppliant at the knees, asking by the holy thing.

themes.label: the lament
themes.note: The grief-cry raised over the irrevocable.
